mapper.select: select to_char(to_date(d.statistics_time,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime,nvl(t.tableNameEn,'') tableNameEn, nvl(t.tableAllCount,0) totalCount, nvl(yesterdayCount,0) incrementCount, nvl(t.tableAllSize,0) as tableAllSize from( select TABLE_NAME_EN tableNameEn , TRUNC(TABLE_ALL_COUNT/ 10000, 2) tableAllCount, TRUNC(YESTERDAY_COUNT/10000, 2) yesterdayCount, TRUNC(TABLE_SIZE / (1024 * 1024 * 1024), 2) tableAllSize, to_char(statistics_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') statistics_time from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN)=upper(#{tableNameEn}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType}) and statistics_time >= TO_DATE(#{beginTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') - 8 and statistics_time < TO_DATE(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') )t right join ( select statistics_time from ( select to_char(to_date(#{beginTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - offs, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as statistics_time from generate_series(0, 8) as offs union all select to_char(to_date(#{beginTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - offs, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as statistics_time from generate_series(-5, -1) as offs ) where statistics_time <= #{endTime} ) d on t.statistics_time = d.statistics_time order by d.statistics_time

select case when table_size = '0' then '0G' when to_char(table_size / 1073741824, 'fm999999999990.00') = '0.00' then '0G' else to_char(table_size / 1073741824, 'fm999999999990.00') || 'G' end as tableAllSize, case when table_all_count = '0' then '0条' when to_char(table_all_count / 10000, 'fm999999999990.00') = '0.00' then '0条' else to_char(table_all_count / 10000, 'fm999999999990.00') || '万条' end as tableAllCount, case when average_daily_volume = '0' then '0条' when to_char(average_daily_volume / 10000, 'fm999999999990.00') = '0.00' then '0条' else to_char(average_daily_volume / 10000, 'fm999999999990.00') || '万条' end as averageDailyCount, case when average_daily_size = '0' then '0G' when to_char(average_daily_size / 1073741824, 'fm999999999990.00') = '0.00' then '0G' else to_char(average_daily_size / 1073741824, 'fm999999999990.00') || 'G' end as averageDailySize from (select TABLE_TYPE, TABLE_NAME_EN, TABLE_PROJECT, table_size, table_all_count, average_daily_volume, average_daily_size from (SELECT j.TABLE_TYPE, j.TABLE_NAME_EN, j.TABLE_PROJECT, j.table_size, j.table_all_count, j.average_daily_volume, j.average_daily_size, row_number() over(PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate)) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) where upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select resourceid from (select distinct resourceid, rownum as rn from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS where upper(table_name_en) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(table_project) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(table_type) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and resourceid is not null and rownum = 1) t

select case when PARTITIONSIZE = '0' then '0' when to_char(PARTITIONSIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(PARTITIONSIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00') end as averageDailySize, case when PARTITIONCOUNT = '0' then '0' when to_char(PARTITIONCOUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(PARTITIONCOUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00') end as averageDailyCount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where partitiondate<to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') and partitiondate>to_char(sysdate-11,'yyyyMMdd') and TABLETYPE = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEPROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'->'||SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as organizationClassifyCh, UPDATE_DATE as updateDate,LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle from (SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, case when j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' then j.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH else j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.TABLE_TYPE, j.TABLE_NAME_EN, j.TABLE_PROJECT, j.UPDATE_DATE, j.LIFE_CYCLE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower( TABLE_PROJECT ), upper( TABLE_NAME_EN ) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
